description: Fitz and Simmons find themselves back in the stark prison, with Simmons giving Fitz his counterpart's wedding ring. Atarah appears, expecting them to start working, but before she can separate them she emits a loud noise and collapses. Enoch arrives, having subdued the Chronicoms, and urges them to quickly embrace so he can extract them from the prison. As they prepare to teleport out, Simmons excitedly tells Fitz he’s a grandfather, leaving him stunned.

transcript.line: Well... that was 5 minutes and 33 seconds wasted. Are you ready to get back to work?
Okay, listen. I'm sorry about what happened to your planet, and I really want to help Enoch, but time travel is a nasty business. And I don't know that I want to be any part of it.
So, if we have to spend the rest of our days in this prison together, then so be it.
You won't be together. You'll be...
I have taken bold action. We must go. Embrace me.
Oh. I almost forgot. You're a grandfather.
What the bloody hell does that...
I can't believe it. Turbo. I wanted to. I pr ayed, but I... He's okay.
He's not... okay. He's locked up in prison... - In space prison, with Simmons.

Oh, they'll be fine. The Chronicoms need them, right? Yeah, they're safe for now. Besides, these two, they... They can survive anything. I bet you 100 bucks they already busted out of the place. Look... even if I had more jump cells available, I can't send you out right now.
I've seen the footage. And they weren't just attacked. Their entire planet was laid waste. And the ones who did it...they're...
... here, yeah. Yeah, they... You kind of... stepped on my moment there, but yeah. They're here.
